---
title: "Andreas Bogossian"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AJBogo9
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bogo9/
    - text: Blog
      href: blog.qmd
    - text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

MSc student in Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at Aalto University, with a minor in Operations Research. Previously completed a BSc in Computer Science with a minor in Mathematics.

My research interests lie at the intersection of machine learning and mathematics. I write about technical concepts in ML, statistics and algorithms — with the goal of building rigorous understanding through structured explanation.
